scripts.dev:electron: tsc -p tsconfig.json && cross-env NODE_ENV=development VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron dist/main.js
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.pack:dmg: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.pack:dir: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dir --config electron-builder.yml
